info.title: Fleeti API
info.description:
API Key management legal conditions.


            Key Management
                While Fleeti implements reasonable security measures to protect keys, the user is fully responsible
                 for the management, protection, and security of their own keys. Fleeti does not guarantee the absolute 
                security of keys and cannot be held responsible for consequences related to any mismanagement, exposure, 
                or unauthorized use of keys.
            
            Key Storage
                The user is required to take all necessary measures to ensure secure storage of their keys. Fleeti cannot 
                be held responsible for consequences arising from insecure storage, loss, or unauthorized access to the user's keys.
            
            Key Exposure
                In the event of unintentional or unauthorized exposure of keys, the user agrees to promptly inform Fleeti 
                of this situation. Fleeti cannot be held responsible for consequences arising from key exposure if the user 
                does not report this situation promptly.
            
            Limitation of Liability
                In no event shall Fleeti, including its officers, employees, affiliates, and partners, be liable for losses, 
                damages, costs, or consequences arising directly or indirectly from the user's use, management, or storage of keys.
            
            Key Compromise
                In the event of the user's API key being compromised, the user agrees to promptly notify Fleeti of the situation. 
                A key compromise is defined as any unauthorized access, exposure, or suspected misuse of the API key.
            
            If the API key has been compromised, Fleeti will take appropriate measures to regenerate a new API key for the user. 
                The compromised key will be deactivated to prevent further unauthorized access, a new key will be generated for the customer.

post.description:
**Restricted Access** [ All Roles ]

The list of 'Properties' depending on the AssetType (If you try to set a property which is not listed here, you will have an error).

AssetType = 10 (Vehicle)
- LicensePlate* (string) : At least 2 characters, should be unique.
- VehicleType* (VehicleTypeEnum) : Light = 1 | Boat = 2 | Truck = 3 | Heavy = 4 | Agricultural = 5 | Minivan = 6 | Van = 7 | Car = 8 | Pickup = 9 | Minibus = 10 | Motorbike = 11 | Machine = 12 | Genset = 13 | Scooter = 14 | ColdRoom = 15 | Bus = 16 | Tricycle = 17
- EnergyType (EnergyTypeEnum) : Gasoline = 1 | Diesel = 2 | BioDiesel = 3 | Ethanol = 4
- ManufacturedYear (long)
- ReleaseYear (long)
- TankCapacity (double)
- IsTankAccessible (bool)
- TheoriticalFuelConsumption (double)

AssetType = 20 (Equipment)
- EquipmentType (EquipmentTypeEnum) : (no value yet).
- EnergyType (EnergyTypeEnum) : Gasoline = 1 | Diesel = 2 | BioDiesel = 3 | Ethanol = 4
- IsPowered (bool)

AssetType = 30 (Site)
- Address (AddressNested) : Composed of the following properties: { AddressLine (string), City (string), State (string), Region (string), PostalCode (string), Country (string), Timezone (string) }.
- SiteType (SiteTypeEnum) : Coldroom = 10
- Dimension (double) : Dimension in square meters (m2).
- ThresholdTemperature* (double) : Required if SiteType = Coldroom, threshold temperature in degrees Celsius (°C).
- IsInternal (bool)

AssetType = 40 (Phone)
- Imei (string)
- Platform (string)

post.summary: Start Navixy-MongoDB real-time sync monitoring task.
post.description:
**Restricted Access** [ FleetiSuperAdmin ]

This endpoint triggers an AWS ECS task to monitor the real-time sync between Navixy and MongoDB.
The task will run with the specified parameters to monitor sync performance.

**Environment Restrictions:**
- This operation is only available in production environments
- Will return 400 Bad Request in development environment

Retrieve monitoring sync jobs (task records) from MongoDB with various filtering options.
Returns only records with type "task".

**Environment Support:**
